import React from 'react'; function Thirteen() { return (

Focus Group Script for Our Language-Learning Network

04-27-2026

What's The Purpose of this Focus Group?

Hi Spanish 102 students. The purpose of this project is to create a social network that allows students who are learning foreign languages to effectively study and review. It creates a more interactive mode of communication, meant for educational purposes. Today you'll be testing out our site.


Login and Test Our Network

  1. Login to the website using one of these two accounts:
    USER 1: test123
    USER2: test234
    Password for both is 1234
  2. Join a section and begin creating posts using the text, audio or trivia features. You can also reply to other users in the chat.
    When testing the trivia feature, there's an optional text box for a trivia prompt. An example of this would include "Translate all of the following sentences" as the title, with each prompt being a sentence for the user to translate.
  3. Once posts have been made, try out the translation, edit, and delete features. Begin brainstorming about which features you like, and which features you think are missing.

Questions to Think About

  • What would make you feel safe enough to post something imperfect — a bad sentence, a wrong conjugation — in front of strangers?
  • If this app existed exactly the way you'd want it to, what would keep you coming back to it every week?
  • What's one thing you've seen in another app that you'd want to steal for this?
); } export default Thirteen;
